title: Oncology Core Vocabulary v1 Checklist
source: BioMedPilot curated oncology core based on TCGA/GDC project labels, common translational oncology concepts, and MeSH heading names

items.label: colon cancer
avoid_expansion_to: rectal cancer unless colorectal context is explicit

items.label: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
items.preferred_en: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
expected_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma

items.label: rectal cancer
avoid_expansion_to: colon cancer unless colorectal context is explicit

items.label: large cell lung carcinoma
items.parent_concept: lung cancer, non-small cell lung cancer

items.label: acute lymphoblastic leukemia
zh_common_names: 急性淋巴母细胞白血病
expected_terms: 急性淋巴母细胞白血病
items.confusion_notes: ALL is an oncology abbreviation but should be treated cautiously outside hematology context.

items.label: cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma
avoid_expansion_to: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
items.confusion_notes: SCC alone is ambiguous and should not strongly expand without an anatomic site.

items.label: 小细胞肺癌
items.confusion_notes: Small cell lung cancer is a high-value lung subtype but not represented as a TCGA project in the core 33.

items.label: 多发性骨髓瘤
items.confusion_notes: MM is useful in oncology but should be interpreted with context outside cancer queries.

items.label: 脑膜瘤
items.confusion_notes: Meningioma should not be collapsed into glioma.

ambiguity_terms.risk: squamous cell carcinoma without anatomic site
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not strongly expand without site context

ambiguity_terms.risk: renal cell carcinoma abbreviation without subtype
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand to all kidney cancer subtypes from RCC alone

ambiguity_terms.risk: mostly papillary thyroid carcinoma in oncology but can be non-oncology outside context
ambiguity_terms.policy: allow oncology mapping but keep leakage tests
maps to colorectal parent, not isolated colon or rectal subtype

ambiguity_terms.risk: multiple myeloma abbreviation can be non-oncology outside context
ambiguity_terms.policy: prefer oncology mapping only with cancer or hematology context
